mapper.select: SELECT order_code FROM customer_order WHERE order_code LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY order_code DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM customer_order WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY deal_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM customer_order WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY deal_time DESC
SELECT * FROM customer_order WHERE status = 1 AND remaining_count > 0 AND start_date <= #{targetDate} AND meal_type IN (#{mealType}, 'ALL')
SELECT * FROM customer_order WHERE start_date <= #{targetDate} AND meal_type IN (#{mealType}, 'ALL') ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_order SET verified_count = verified_count + 1, remaining_count = remaining_count - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND remaining_count > 0 AND status = 1

UPDATE customer_order SET verified_count = verified_count + 1, verified_amount = verified_amount + #{price}, meal_balance = meal_balance - #{price}, remaining_count = remaining_count - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND remaining_count > 0 AND status = 1
UPDATE customer_order SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND remaining_count = 0 AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT meal_type, SUM(verification_count) AS verified_count FROM meal_verification_log WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) GROUP BY meal_type
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_order SET verified_count = GREATEST(COALESCE(verified_count, 0) - 1, 0), verified_amount = GREATEST(COALESCE(verified_amount, 0) - ( CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM meal_verification_log v WHERE v.id = ( SELECT max_id FROM ( SELECT MAX(id) AS max_id FROM meal_verification_log WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND (deleted = 0 OR deleted IS NULL) ) t ) AND v.meal_type IN ('LUNCH', 'DINNER')) THEN (SELECT lunch_dinner_price FROM customer_order WHERE id = #{orderId}) ELSE (SELECT breakfast_price FROM customer_order WHERE id = #{orderId}) END ), 0), remaining_count = remaining_count + 1, status = CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE status END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId}
